title: Stainless Steel Soup Ladle – Extra-Deep Large-Capacity Ladle with Long Hollow Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Easy to Clean – Ideal for Soup, Stew, Broth & Sauce
features: 1. Extra - Deep and Large - Capacity Ladling：The ReaNea Soup Ladle features an extra - deep ladle head with a generous capacity, allowing you to scoop up large portions of soup, stew, sauce, or broth in one go. Whether you're serving a big family dinner or a crowd at a party, this ladle makes the job quick and easy.​

2. Ergonomic Hollow - Handle Design：Designed with your comfort in mind, the ladle’s long, hollow handle follows ergonomic principles, providing a secure and comfortable grip. The hollow construction helps reduce heat transfer, keeping the handle cool even when dealing with hot liquids, minimizing the risk of burns.​

3. Sturdy and Durable Build：Crafted from high - quality stainless steel, this ladle is built to last. It resists rust, corrosion, and warping, ensuring reliable performance for daily cooking and long - term use. Its robust construction can withstand the rigors of frequent use in both home and professional kitchens.​

4. Effortless Cleaning and Maintenance：Thanks to its smooth, polished surface, the ReaNea Soup Ladle is incredibly easy to clean. Food residues slide off effortlessly, and it’s completely dishwasher - safe, saving you time and effort on cleanup. Spend less time scrubbing and more time enjoying your delicious creations.​

5. Versatile and Practical Cooking Essential：This ladle isn’t just for soups. Its deep bowl and long handle make it perfect for a variety of tasks, such as serving chili, transferring stocks, or portioning out sauces. A must - have addition to any kitchen, it combines functionality, durability, and ease of use in one essential tool.​
